ground_truth_fix: Now, to fix this we need to change the code so data can't exceed 65536. We do this by specifying a maximum amount of iterations(extensions) and setting the max size of each extension. I modified the program to add these constrains, I chose max 32 extensions and max 2048 bytes per extension which seems sane values (32 * 2048 = 65536), these can be changed.

candidate_repairs.patch_hint: Add bounds check: if (data + offset + size <= data_end)
candidate_repairs.rationale: The required packet access proof was never established.

evidence.detail: invalid access to packet, off=90 size=1, R0(id=22,off=90,r=0)
The required packet access proof was never established.
Verifier symptom: invalid access to packet, off=90 size=1, R0(id=22,off=90,r=0)
Branch at insn 13 appears to establish a proof: if r5 > r2 goto pc+18
Root cause localized to insn 28, earlier than the reject site.
